title: SkewRatio Result
description: Returns the distortion ratio of the detected object.
notes:
SkewRatio returns the distortion ratio when SkewFitEnable is set to True.  If the property is set to False, SkewRatio returns 1.0.

The distortion ratio is a scale ratio between the distortion direction returned by SkewDirection and the direction perpendicular to it.

If the object has no distortion, the result is 1.0.
